subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto those who are in the world, that they may turn unto God, the Sovereign of eternity, and bear witness to that which God Himself hath testified [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فی العالم لیتوجهن الی الله مالک القدم و یشهدن بما شهد الله
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
